from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader


def render_welcome_page(username: str) -> str:
    env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader("templates"))
    template = env.get_template("welcome.html")
    return template.render(username=username)


def build_email_body(user_input: str) -> str:
    env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader("templates"))
    template = env.get_template("email_body.html")
    return template.render(user_message=user_input)


def render_dashboard(user_name: str) -> str:
    env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader("templates"))
    template = env.get_template("dashboard.html")
    return template.render(name=user_name, title="Dashboard")


def generate_report_html(data: dict) -> str:
    env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader("templates"))
    template = env.get_template("report.html")
    return template.render(**data)
